title: crambe cordifolia subsp. kotschyana
intro: Crambe cordifolia subsp. kotschyana is a subspecies of the Crambe cordifolia plant, belonging to the Brassicaceae family, commonly known as sea-kale or sea-cabbage. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Crambe cordifolia subsp. kotschyana include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and protect against oxidative stress. Crambe cordifolia subsp. kotschyana is often used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
